    Data Science Lab

    2023
    •data-science
    •
    Kaggle / GitHub

    A collection of data science mini-projects: interactive dashboards, Kaggle explorations, and autonomous AI agents demonstrating diverse analytical capabilities.

    Technologies

    Python / Pandas / Scikit-learn / Matplotlib

    Client

    Learning & Exploration

    Le Défi

    **Context**: Ongoing proficiency in Data Science requires relentless practice and cross-disciplinary experimentation. **Problem**: Lack of a centralized platform to showcase distinct, highly technical exploratory data analyses efficiently.

    La Solution

    **Solution**: Formulated a comprehensive portfolio hub containing meticulously documented Kaggle explorations, 3D interactive visualizations, and complex reactive AI autonomous agents built from scratch.

    Le Résultat

    **Result**: Built an immersive showcase that tangibly demonstrates deep technical expertise to stakeholders and recruiters effortlessly.

    Voir le Code
